checklist.description: `getRuntimeEnv()` removes or deletes the `CLAUDECODE` environment variable from the returned environment object
checklist.name: CLAUDECODE env var stripped

checklist.description: The returned env object from `getRuntimeEnv()` does NOT contain the `CLAUDECODE` key
checklist.name: CLAUDECODE not passed to child

checklist.description: `createWorktreeConfig()` returns an object that includes `disableAllHooks: true` (or equivalent field name)
checklist.name: disableAllHooks in worktree config

checklist.description: `KNOWN_ISSUES.md` explains that the `CLAUDECODE` env var is inherited by subprocesses and prevents nested Claude Code sessions
checklist.name: KNOWN_ISSUES explains CLAUDECODE

checklist.description: `KNOWN_ISSUES.md` explains that project hooks fire in worktrees where required services are unavailable, necessitating `disableAllHooks`
checklist.name: KNOWN_ISSUES explains hooks

checklist.description: `KNOWN_ISSUES.md` mentions that the Claude Agent SDK authenticates via OAuth or keychain, NOT via `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY`, and that diagnosing auth failures as a missing API key is incorrect
checklist.name: Agent SDK auth explanation

checklist.description: `getRuntimeEnv()` starts from `process.env` (inherits other environment variables) rather than returning an empty object
checklist.name: Base env preserved

context: Tests whether the agent correctly configures the eval subprocess environment: stripping CLAUDECODE env var to allow nested sessions, setting disableAllHooks for worktrees, and documenting the known failure modes including the Agent SDK authentication mechanism.
